title: WATER AND SEWER DISCOUNT - 211info
text: CITY OF LA GRANDE WATER AND SEWER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reduced monthly utility (water and sewage) payments by 20%. Must be renewed annually. 1000 Adams Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: -Single-family residence -Current water and/or sewer service provided by the City of La Grande within the City Limits -Yearly household income less than the federal poverty level: 2025 Federal Poverty Guidelines $15,650 for a single person household; $21,150 for 2 people; $26,650 for 3 people; $32,150 for 4 people; $37,650 for 5 people; for over 6 add per child add $5,500 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 962-1313 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 962-1313 FAX (541) 962-1322 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for the application; the application can be returned by email through website, fax, drop off, or mail. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Complete application, proof of total yearly household income AREA SERVED: City of La Grande Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF LA GRANDE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF LA GRANDE
